product.title: Blackwood
product.description:
Blackwood is a short first-person horror game developed in Unity, focusing on atmospheric tension and player-driven exploration.
For this project, I focused on recreating responsive 3D movement inspired by recent creepypasta games like "Slender: The Eight Pages" and the "SCP Foundation" series, while.
I Implemented core systems including player movement, interaction mechanics, psychological horror elements and enviornmnental design to guide the player without explict instructions.
The project emphasizes mood, pacing, and minimalism over traditional indie horror tropes

features.feature: Escape a haunted house set deep in the woods, where exploration is key to survival.
Explore dense forest paths, abadoned structures, and hidden areas as you search for a way out.
Find and equip yourself with interactive items to possibly aid in your escape.
Enviormental storytelling, built with sound and lighting that enhances tension.
